name: m1_diff_default_off
description: Diff capture is OFF by default: a FILE_CHANGE carrying an inline diff has the diff stripped before persistence (content_stripped), byte-identical to pre-feature behavior. No sidecar is written and no diff_ref appears.

events.diff:
diff --git a/throughlog/app.py b/throughlog/app.py
--- a/throughlog/app.py
+++ b/throughlog/app.py
@@ -1 +1,2 @@
 import os
+x = 1
